content.en:
A month later.

The passage of the battlefield ruins is stable, and a famous true monarch officially enters the battlefield ruins.

At the entrance of the huge space passage, the dense True Monarch entered the battlefield ruins like streamers, and Ye Tian and the Yunzi Divine Maiden also entered the battlefield ruins together.

After entering the battlefield ruins, many true monarchs did not immediately take action, after all, with so many true monarchs present, who dared to make a move, wouldn't they be looking for death?

The True Monarchs flew away in all directions, gradually disappearing without a trace.

And Ye Tian and Yun Zi Divine Maiden also flew in one direction, but they also attracted the attention of some True Monarchs.

It's just that everyone else knows Ye Tian, the true monarch who is the number one true monarch on the list of true monarchs, so they don't dare to have any unfavorable thoughts about Ye Tian.

However, just after the Void Heaven Hall Longhai True Monarch left, a half-step True Ancestor-level powerhouse had his eyes on Ye Tian.

If Longhai Zhenjun was here, if this half-step True Ancestor wanted to make a move on Ye Tian, he would probably be stopped by Longhai Zhenjun, but now that Longhai Zhenjun had left, naturally no one would stop this half-step True Ancestor powerhouse.

The other side.

Ye Tian received some information, it was from some True Monarchs of the Void Heaven Palace.

These True Monarchs reminded him that there seemed to be a half-step True Ancestor coming in his direction, so let him pay attention and try to avoid that half-step True Ancestor.

"The Eyeless True Monarch of the Blood Moon Sect!"

Ye Tian knew that this half-step True Ancestor was not as strong as Longhai True Monarch, and he was only ranked 253rd on the True Monarch List at the beginning, but he was lucky enough to obtain the Innate Origin Life in the Realm Source Realm, thus breaking the shackles in one fell swoop and being promoted to the half-step True Ancestor realm.

And now, the Eyeless True Monarch has also walked a lot of distance at the level of the half-step True Ancestor, and according to the speculation of the outside world, he has at least completed the fifty percent fusion of the Great Dao and the soul.

Therefore, the Eyeless True Monarch was at least several times stronger than when he had just broken through to the half-step True Ancestor!

"Yun Zi Divine Maiden, I guess I've been targeted by a half-step True Ancestor!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

"Oh, which half-step True Ancestor is it?"

Yun Zi Divine Maiden asked.

"The Eyeless True Monarch of the Blood Moon Sect!" Ye Tian replied.

"It's him!" Yun Zi Divine Maiden also knew about this half-step True Ancestor, but she didn't panic.

She was naturally far from being the opponent of the Eyeless True Monarch, but she had confidence in Ye Tian.

"Ten Thousand Laws Daozi, the Eyeless True Monarch shouldn't be able to threaten you!" said the Yunzi Divine Maiden.

"Yun Zi Divine Maiden believes in my strength like this, that's a half-step True Ancestor!" Ye Tian said with a smile.

"What about the half-step True Ancestor, which of the True Monarchs on the True Monarch List is worse than the weak True Ancestor? And Wanfa Daozi, your strength is far superior to that of other True Monarch Lists, even if the Eyeless True Monarch was the 253rd True Monarch on the True Monarch List before, but after he became a half-step True Ancestor, I don't think his strength is still your opponent. Otherwise, you wouldn't be so calm!"

Yun Zi Divine Maiden said.

Ye Tian was about to say something, but suddenly his expression was solemn, and he said, "He's here!"

A half-step True Ancestor was not a weak person, although Ye Tian was very confident in his own strength, he did not dare to underestimate it.

After all, no one knows if the other party has any amazing hole cards, and if they have any terrible weapons, it is easy to be counter-killed.

So, he doesn't underestimate anyone.

"Yunzi Divine Maiden, you go first, I'll catch up with you soon!"

Ye Tian admonished.

"Good!"

The Cloud Purple Priestess nodded, and quickly flew away in front of her.

She knew her strength very well, and in the face of a half-step True Ancestor powerhouse like Eyeless True Monarch, it was estimated that she would not be able to withstand even a single move, not even the aftermath of the battle.

Therefore, if she stays here, it will only cause chaos for Ye Tian, so it is better to stay away from here quickly.

Seconds after the Cloud Purple Divine Maiden left, the Eyeless True Monarch appeared.

"Wanfa Daozi, you didn't even escape?"

Eyeless True Monarch was slightly surprised.

It stands to reason that once Ye Tian senses his breath, he will definitely flee immediately.

But now, Ye Tian stood there as if he was waiting for him, he was so calm.

"Is there a fraud?"

The Eyeless True Monarch panicked for a moment, but his divine sense swept around, but he didn't find any trace of any other half-step True Ancestor.

"Hmph, pretend to be calm!"

Eyeless True Monarch thought to himself.

"Eyeless True Monarch, are you here to kill me?" Ye Tian asked.

"Of course!" "Eyeless True Monarch said coldly: "You killed our Blood Moon Sect's True Monarch Bang True Monarch, and it was two of them, which brought a huge loss to our Blood Moon Sect, and our Blood Moon Sect's Dao Ancestor has an order, if he finds an opportunity to kill you, he must kill you!"

"Just because you want to kill me too, who gave you the courage?"

Ye Tian sneered.

"I am a half-step true ancestor, and you are just a true monarch, the strength of the true monarch has a limit, even the most powerful true monarch is difficult to deal with a half-step true ancestor who has been promoted at the top of the true monarch list, and I have completed the fifty percent fusion of the Great Dao and the soul. With my strength, even the most powerful True Monarch in the Chaos Countless Ages can hardly be my opponent, let alone you!"

Eyeless True Monarch said confidently.

He didn't talk nonsense, for fear that Ye Tian would ask for help, so he asked Longhai Zhenjun to support him, so he shot instantly.

Rumble!!!!

This area instantly turned into a sea of blood, and this was the Blood River Immortal Technique.

The Blood Moon Sect was proficient in all kinds of bloodline supernatural powers, and the Eyeless True Monarch had practiced the Blood River Immortal Technique, thus creating a great reputation.

Although the Blood River Immortal Technique was only a chaotic supernatural power, not an origin supernatural power, it also greatly increased the life-saving ability of the Eyeless True Monarch, and even if the other half-step True Monarchs were stronger than him, it would be difficult to kill him.

The Eyeless True Monarch cast the Blood River Immortal Technique, not to save his life, but to cooperate with an Origin Divine Power—Blood Devouring!

Blood devouring is the Eyeless True Monarch's fame-in-origin supernatural power, and it is also his greatest pride.

Blooddevouring the blood of his enemies merges into his blood, growing it and sustaining him in battle.

As a result, his strength will hardly run out, and his enemies will grow weaker and weaker until he finally kills them.

As soon as the blood devouring came out, Ye Tian felt that the blood in his body was about to leave his body, and he was immediately surprised by the blood-devouring divine power of the Eyeless True Monarch.

But he didn't panic, and immediately used his true body of the blood river.

This Origin Divine Power forcibly locked his blood, but there was still a trace of blood leaking out from the Void Passage that was difficult to lock, but his own strength was still affected somewhat.

"Shake the sky!"

Ye Tian used his own medium-grade origin supernatural power.

Rumble!!!!

The void shattered, turning any space in this area into nothingness at an unimaginable speed, and the rules were shattering, as if nothing could exist as if nothing could exist.

Time and space seemed to be crumbling, and terrifying concussive forces and spatial forces continued to invade the body of the Eyeless True Monarch.

"Not good!"

Eyeless True Monarch's face changed drastically, and he quickly fled from here, but a small part of his body was still shattered, and he was seriously injured.

That's when it happened.

Ye Tian's God Destroying Strike is coming!
